name: Amaretto Breeze
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, beat together the cream cheese and sour cream at medium speed using an electric mixer until well blended.
2. Gradually blend in the sugar, Amaretto (or almond-flavored liqueur), and whipping cream until smooth.
3. Chill the mixture thoroughly.
4. Divide the berries among individual serving dishes.
5. Top each dish with the prepared cream cheese sauce.
